description: A plain candid color photograph of a very large American flag hung vertically from the upper exterior of a modern white office/government building, suspended on two angled poles. The flag drapes down several stories with its blue star field in the upper-left corner and red-and-white stripes flowing down over the building's white facade and tinted windows. Below is a green lawn, a palm tree trunk at right, and a clear blue sky with light clouds above. There is no on-image text, slogan, seal, or graphic-design overlay; it is a straightforward patriotic photograph (caption text 'One Nation under God' appears only in the tweet body, not on the image). Not a designed meme/poster.
